blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,930 ft. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
